description_long: This house features a Mediterranean architectural style with a light tan tiled hip roof and a symmetrical facade. The front is adorned with a series of arched windows and doors, supported by classical columns, and a prominent entry staircase leading to a covered porch. The property is surrounded by a low white wall and landscaped with green lawns, flowering trees, and shrubs. The side and rear views reveal additional windows, a driveway, and a garage structure, as well as a spacious backyard. The exterior walls are finished in a light, neutral color, complementing the roof and lush landscaping. The house sits at the intersection of two paved streets, enhancing its urban residential character.
description: A Mediterranean-style two-story house with a tan hip roof, arched windows, columned porch, and landscaped yard, enclosed by a white wall.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry staircase, arched windows, columned porch, and lush landscaping along the street.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and additional windows, with a clear view of the backyard and side garden.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, garage, and a secondary entrance, with visible landscaping and boundary wall.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the symmetrical facade, arched windows, and the full length of the house along the street.
attribute_entryway_design: Grand entry staircase with arched double doors, covered porch supported by classical columns, and decorative landscaping.
